nasb.text: In the twelfth year of Joram the son of Ahab king of Israel, Ahaziah the son of Jehoram king of Judah began to reign.

esv.text: In the twelfth year of Joram the son of Ahab, king of Israel, Ahaziah the son of Jehoram, king of Judah, began to reign.

cnv.text: 以色列王亞哈的兒子約蘭在位第十二年，猶大王約蘭的兒子亞哈謝作猶大王。

ccb.text: 以色列王亚哈的儿子约兰执政第十二年，犹大王约兰的儿子亚哈谢登基。
